jsonLd.title: Swiggy is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Swiggy family as a E-commerce Executive in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
